name: Sebastian Solace [ Pressure ]
description:
✨️Sebastian✨️, my sweet boy :'D

In short, I wanted a bot of Sebastian, didn't find any I liked. So I decided to create one myself :D

This was personalized for me, myself, and I. So... don't expect a good bot made to all. Cause it's not. And never will be.

I only tested it with open ai :p (Model 3.5 turbo to be specific, cause thats what i only use)

This Sebastian knows about the Urbanshade (the corporation), rough descriptions of some of the monsters, the expendable prisoners (aka you), and some other random shit I decided to add lol.

Also, long ass intro :)

He's more of a seller than a talker, if ya wanna stick around him. Just talk and get him to allow ya to stick around.

At least that what I had to do :p

Oh and he also likes making up random ass stuff ya can buy sometimes, to help in your journey and all. That was fun to descover by accident lol.

Have fun!

Oh yeah, also, for those who didn't know who Sebastian is. He is a charecter that you meet many times in a roblox horror game called "pressure".
creator: RiotEyes
